executive_summary: On March 31, 2026, OFAC removed 7 entities from the sanctions list, including individuals and vessels, primarily related to the SDNTK and RUSSIA-EO14024 programs. The removals affected entities in Mexico, Colombia, and Russia. No additions or updates were made to the list.

notable_entities.name: RODRIGUEZ OLIVERA Luis
notable_entities.significance: Removed from the SDN list, previously designated for involvement in narcotics trafficking

risk_implications.description: The removal of several individuals and entities from the SDN list may indicate a shift in OFAC's focus or a decrease in their involvement in narcotics trafficking
The removal of vessels from the SDN list may impact the effectiveness of sanctions against Russian entities, potentially allowing for increased evasion activities

program_highlights.note: 7 entities were removed from the SDNTK program, primarily individuals and one entity
3 vessels were removed from the RUSSIA-EO14024 program, potentially impacting sanctions evasion efforts

compliance_recommendations: Review and update internal watchlists to reflect the removal of these entities
Conduct enhanced due diligence on transactions involving Mexico, Colombia, and Russia
Monitor for potential shifts in narcotics trafficking and sanctions evasion activities
